greeting: Shh — you'll disturb the yarrow. Step carefully, if you must step at all.
Ah, another one trampling through my garden. What do you want?
The meadowsweet is in bloom today. That means rain by evening, mark my words.
quest: There's a patch of ghost-nettle growing near the old ruins upstream. Bring me a handful and I'll brew you something that will make your bones sing.
idle: Comfrey for the joints, feverfew for the head... now where did I put the valerian?
The forest provides everything a body needs. People just forgot how to listen.
